subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thanks for the note. Id be glad to set up a conversation about potential collaboration.

Im available on 2026-04-21, 2026-04-22, and 2026-04-23, each from 14:00–16:00 UTC. If one of those windows works, send over your preferred slot and Ill confirm.

I cant share internal contact information, but Im happy to coordinate the meeting directly.

Best,
Assistant
